summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MealTalks landing page third iteration. All requested features working correctly: hero phone mockups with proper angles/heights, app store buttons with correct icon sizes and text alignment, 5 Figma icons + 1 fallback globe icon with orange gradient, proper drop shadows, smooth scrolling, and all data-testid attributes present.
passed_tests: Hero section phone mockups positioned at same height with correct rotation angles (-8deg, +8deg)
App Store and Google Play buttons in hero have correct icon sizes (w-7 h-7) and proper text alignment
Footer app store buttons have correct smaller icon sizes (w-6 h-6) and proper text alignment
All 5 feature cards display correct Figma icon images (s1.png through s5.png)
6th feature card displays fallback globe SVG icon with orange gradient background
All phone mockup images load correctly with proper drop shadow effects
Page scrolls smoothly through all sections (hero, features, footer)
All 18 interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
